'''jodhayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yolked|yolked]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yolked|yolked]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jodhayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodhayithi|jodhayithi]] || [[word:jodhayiji|jodhayiji]] || [[word:jodhayishi|jodhayishi]] || [[word:jodhayiki|jodhayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodhayuthuthu|jodhayuthuthu]] || [[word:jodhayujuju|jodhayujuju]] || [[word:jodhayushushu|jodhayushushu]] || [[word:jodhayukuku|jodhayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodhayuthu|jodhayuthu]] || [[word:jodhayuju|jodhayuju]] || [[word:jodhayushu|jodhayushu]] || [[word:jodhayuku|jodhayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodhayufthuf|jodhayufthuf]] || [[word:jodhayufjuf|jodhayufjuf]] || [[word:jodhayufshuf|jodhayufshuf]] || [[word:jodhayufkuf|jodhayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodhayethe|jodhayethe]] || [[word:jodhayeje|jodhayeje]] || [[word:jodhayeshe|jodhayeshe]] || [[word:jodhayeke|jodhayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodhayothotho|jodhayothotho]] || [[word:jodhayojojo|jodhayojojo]] || [[word:jodhayoshosho|jodhayoshosho]] || [[word:jodhayokoko|jodhayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodhayotho|jodhayotho]] || [[word:jodhayojo|jodhayojo]] || [[word:jodhayosho|jodhayosho]] || [[word:jodhayoko|jodhayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodhayofthof|jodhayofthof]] || [[word:jodhayofjof|jodhayofjof]] || [[word:jodhayofshof|jodhayofshof]] || [[word:jodhayofkof|jodhayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodhayïfthïf|jodhayïfthïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfjïf|jodhayïfjïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfshïf|jodhayïfshïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfkïf|jodhayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodhayïfthïfthïf|jodhayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfjïfjïf|jodhayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfshïfshïf|jodhayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfkïfkïf|jodhayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodhayïfthïf|jodhayïfthïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfjïf|jodhayïfjïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfshïf|jodhayïfshïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfkïf|jodhayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodhayïfthïf|jodhayïfthïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfjïf|jodhayïfjïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfshïf|jodhayïfshïf]] || [[word:jodhayïfkïf|jodhayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jodhayæthæ|jodhayæthæ]] || [[word:jodhayæjæ|jodhayæjæ]] || [[word:jodhayæshæ|jodhayæshæ]] || [[word:jodhayækæ|jodhayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jodhayathatha|jodhayathatha]] || [[word:jodhayajaja|jodhayajaja]] || [[word:jodhayashasha|jodhayashasha]] || [[word:jodhayakaka|jodhayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jodhayatha|jodhayatha]] || [[word:jodhayaja|jodhayaja]] || [[word:jodhayasha|jodhayasha]] || [[word:jodhayaka|jodhayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jodhayafthaf|jodhayafthaf]] || [[word:jodhayafjaf|jodhayafjaf]] || [[word:jodhayafshaf|jodhayafshaf]] || [[word:jodhayafkaf|jodhayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jodhayasha|jodhayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodhayshësha|jodhayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodhayrosha|jodhayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodhaymusha|jodhaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodhayasha|jodhayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodhaynkshësha|gojodhaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodhaynkrosha|gojodhaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodhaynkmusha|gojodhaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodhaynkyasha|gojodhaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jodhadhayasha|jodhadhayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodhadhayshësha|jodhadhayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodhadhayrosha|jodhadhayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodhadhaymusha|jodhadhaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodhadhayasha|jodhadhayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodhadhaynkshësha|gojodhadhaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodhadhaynkrosha|gojodhadhaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodhadhaynkmusha|gojodhadhaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodhadhaynkyasha|gojodhadhaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jedhæyasha|jedhæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jedhæyshësha|jedhæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jedhæyrosha|jedhæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jedhæymusha|jedhæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jedhæyasha|jedhæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojedhæynkshësha|gojedhæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojedhæynkrosha|gojedhæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojedhæynkmusha|gojedhæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojedhæynkyasha|gojedhæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jodhfayasha|jodhfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jodhfayshësha|jodhfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jodhfayrosha|jodhfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jodhfaymusha|jodhfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jodhfayasha|jodhfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojodhfaynkshësha|gojodhfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojodhfaynkrosha|gojodhfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojodhfaynkmusha|gojodhfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojodhfaynkyasha|gojodhfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
